subcodes.first_line: O thou who willeth the Kingdom of divine verses and standeth firm in the establishment of steadfast feet! By the life of God, verily the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اراده الله ملکوت الایات و اقامه علی تثبیت الاقدام لعمر الله ان اهل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @rejection, opposition and persecution, @firmness in the Covenant
